title: Personal Chauffeur (Shift Work Schedule)
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

OF BY FOR MANAGEMENT, a Family Office registered in Singapore since 2021, is private wealth and management company.

Job Summary

We are seeking a professional and responsible Personal Chauffeur comfortable with the shift schedule to provide safe and reliable transportation for the family, primarily ferrying young toddlers along with their caregivers. The ideal candidate will uphold the highest standards of professionalism, discretion, and courtesy.

Responsibilities

  • Provide safe and reliable chauffeuring services for the employer and family members.
  • Transport children safely to and from school and activities, ensuring their safety throughout the journey.
  • Plan and execute timely transportation routes to meet scheduled commitments.
  • Maintain vehicle cleanliness and perform routine checks to ensure vehicles are well-maintained inside and out.
  • Communicate clearly and courteously with passengers and caregivers to support a positive travel experience.
  • Adapt to changing schedules by working flexible hours, including public holidays and weekends as needed.
  • Perform additional errands and duties as assigned to support family needs.

Required competencies and certifications

  • Hold a valid Class 3 or 3A driving license issued by the Singapore Traffic Police.
  • Demonstrate at least 2 years of regular driving experience with a clean driving record and excellent driving skills.
  • Possess strong knowledge of Singapore roads and traffic regulations.
  • Communicate effectively in the Chinese language to communicate with Chinese native passengers.
  • Show responsibility, punctuality, professionalism, and teamwork in daily tasks.
  • Have experience driving MPV vehicles or vehicles with more than 6 seats.

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Excellent interpersonal skills to maintain professionalism, courtesy, and discretion with all individuals.

Shift Work Schedule

  • Monday, Tuesday, Friday: 8:30am – 10:30am
  • Wednesday, Thursday, Sunday: 4:30pm – 7:30pm
